mapper.update: UPDATE wallets SET available_balance = available_balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE wallets SET available_balance = available_balance - #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE wallets SET available_balance = available_balance - #{amount}, locked_balance = locked_balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE wallets SET locked_balance = locked_balance - #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO escrows (work_case_id, amount, status, held_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{workCaseId}, #{amount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE escrows SET status = #{status}, released_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE work_case_id = #{workCaseId}
mapper.select: SELECT available_balance FROM wallets WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM wallets WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_transactions ( wallet_id, reference_type, reference_id, transaction_type, amount, idempotency_key, available_before, available_after, locked_before, locked_after ) VALUES ( #{walletId}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{availableBefore}, #{availableAfter}, #{lockedBefore}, #{lockedAfter} )
